title: Raw milk lattes stir debate in Wyoming
content:
Public health officials in Wyoming have ordered a shop to stop selling raw milk lattes, drawing the ire of a former state representative.

The former legislator, Tyler Lidholm, was the chief author of Wyoming’s Food Freedom Act. He already faced off with the state’s Department of

title: EU funding review finds food safety benefits
content:
An evaluation of a funding program has found it substantially improved the European Union’s capability to respond proactively to food safety risks.

The review was led by the Directorate-General for Health and Food Safety (DG Sante) and covers funding for animal and plant health and official controls from

title: Recall of chocolate bars expanded after source of Salmonella identified
content:
Spring & Mulberry is expanding its previously announced recall of select chocolate bars because of contamination with Salmonella.

The expansion follows a comprehensive root cause investigation conducted by the company’s manufacturing partners in coordination with food safety experts and the Food and Drug Administration. The investigation has now
